title: lobelia pubescens var. incisa
intro: Lobelia pubescens var. incisa, also known as mountain lobelia or Indian tobacco, is a plant species belonging to the Lobelia genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and inflammation, due to its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lobelia pubescens var. incisa include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including asthma and tuberculosis.
